summary: Iteration 28 - Complete testing of invoice generation, finance transactions, and enterprise documents. All 15 tests passed. Verified that order creation generates: 1) Invoice in enterprise_invoices with correct fees, 2) Document entry in enterprise_documents, 3) Finance transaction with enterprise_net amount. Verified order status updates correctly affect invoice status and finance transactions.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactored routers in /app/backend/routers/ (auth.py, payments.py, websocket.py, shared.py) are well-structured but NOT YET integrated into server.py - this is noted as future work
TITELLI_FEES configuration is duplicated in both server.py (line 954) and routers/shared.py (line 25) - should be consolidated when routers are integrated
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing with TEST_ prefix in item names
context_for_next_testing_agent: All invoice and finance features verified working: 1) Order creation generates invoice with invoice_number, order_id, client_info, subtotal, fees (2.9% transaction, 10% management), enterprise_net, 2) Document entry created in enterprise_documents with category='factures', 3) Finance transaction created with enterprise_net as amount, 4) GET /api/enterprise/invoices returns list with summary, 5) GET /api/enterprise/invoices/{id} returns detail with related order, 6) GET /api/enterprise/documents?category=factures returns invoices, 7) GET /api/enterprise/finances returns transactions with summary, 8) Order status 'completed' marks invoice as 'paid', 9) Order status 'cancelled' removes finance transaction and marks invoice as 'cancelled'. Enterprise ID Spa Luxury: b34dd7dd-e7ac-4308-83c8-173163ebc819.

invoice_generation.create_order_generates_invoice: PASS - Invoice created in enterprise_invoices collection
invoice_generation.invoice_contains_required_fields: PASS - invoice_number, order_id, client_info, subtotal, transaction_fee, management_fee, enterprise_net, total_ttc, status

document_generation.create_order_generates_document: PASS - Document entry created in enterprise_documents
document_generation.document_metadata: PASS - Contains invoice_number, order_id, client_name, total, enterprise_net

finance_transaction_generation.transaction_structure: PASS - enterprise_id, reference_id (order_id), amount (enterprise_net), transaction_type='income', category='ventes'

enterprise_invoices_endpoint.GET /api/enterprise/invoices: PASS - Returns invoices list with summary
enterprise_invoices_endpoint.GET /api/enterprise/invoices/{id}: PASS - Returns invoice detail with related order
enterprise_invoices_endpoint.summary_fields: PASS - total_invoices, pending_invoices, paid_invoices, total_pending_amount, total_paid_amount, total_net_revenue, total_fees_paid

enterprise_documents_endpoint.merges_both_collections: PASS - Merges documents and enterprise_documents collections

order_status_updates.cancelled_removes_finance_transaction: PASS - Finance transaction deleted, invoice status='cancelled'
